paper.title: Announcing OpenAI Grove Cohort 2
paper.abstract: Applications are now open for OpenAI Grove Cohort 2, a 5-week founder program designed for individuals at any stage, from pre-idea to product. Participants receive $50K in API credits, early access to AI tools, and hands-on mentorship from the OpenAI team.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
